title: [BUG] excel js cannot insert  value in merge cell
author: ibalaji777
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

Lib version: current version

## Steps To Reproduce

<!-- The exact steps required to reproduce the issue, ideally with a code example -->

```javascript
const wb = new ExcelJS.Workbook();
const ws = wb.addWorksheet('XYZ');
worksheet.mergeCells('A4:B5');

// ... merged cells are linked
worksheet.getCell('B5').value = 'Hell
```
